diagrams.title: Basic Computer System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how CPU, Memory, and I/O devices are connected through system buses
diagrams.purpose: Understanding fundamental computer organization and data flow between components

diagrams.title: Instruction Execution Cycle
diagrams.description: Four-stage pipeline showing how instructions are processed by CPU
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CPU processes instructions step by step

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Inverted pyramid showing different levels of memory with speed and capacity trade-offs
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory trade-offs between speed, capacity, and cost
